name: WP-8 — Inngest scans: wire monthly-report-cron + daily-reminder-scan + review-due-scan to v2
description: Wire the Inngest scan functions onto v2 twins. Enumeration §3.5 / §6 WP-8.
acceptanceCriteria: Scan functions read the canonical model (docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical — flag-gated; legacy intact until WP-FLAG. Verify each scan still dispatches in production (cron/event registered). Unit + integration green.
